creator: erwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Update committed with the following modifications: 
1) the build fails when DBI is not installed, so 
BUILD_DEPENDS should not be removed 
2) p5-perl-ldap depends on security/p5-Authen-SASL 
which is for perl 5.6.0 or higher, so this port is 
as well.
